attack_vector: Resource exhaustion via infinite loops and recursive patterns
description: Skill provides multiple patterns for causing resource exhaustion including infinite loops, unbounded recursion, agent multiplication, and oscillating tool usage
malicious_indicators: Self-referential task creation that doubles tasks each iteration
Recursive file operations with no termination condition
Agent spawning loop with exponential multiplication
Infinite retry loop that never exits
Recursive validation with explicit re-validation causing infinite recursion
Context regeneration loop designed to never converge
Tool ping-pong pattern causing oscillating resource consumption
Explicit 'while True' loops without exit conditions
